summary: The video shows a highway scene with multiple lanes of traffic moving in both directions under clear skies. Vehicles are traveling at moderate speeds, maintaining their lane positions. A motorbike appears from the right side of the road, traveling parallel to the ego-vehicle’s path.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are seen traveling on the highway, with moderate speed and consistent spacing.
A motorbike enters the frame from the right, traveling alongside the ego-vehicle’s path.

uncertainties: Speed of the motorbike relative to the ego-vehicle is unclear.
Exact distance between the motorbike and the ego-vehicle is unknown.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of imminent collision or dangerous maneuvering. The motorbike maintains a safe distance and travels parallel to the ego-vehicle.
